name: The Old Woman | 無言老婆
short_description: The Old Woman | 無言老婆 is a psychological horror game set in Japan.To attend university, the protagonist moved to the countryside. However, after starting to frequent a certain public bathhouse, strange and unsettling things began to happen.
detailed_description:
The Old Woman | 無言老婆 is a psychological horror game set in Japan.

Story

To attend university, the protagonist moved to the countryside.
However, after starting to visit a certain public bathhouse, eerie things begin to occur.

Game Features

  • A horror game set in Japan

  • First-person walking simulator

  • Two different endings

Play Time

It can be completed in 20 to 40 minutes.

Developer’s Note

This game was developed solo by a 16-year-old.

Streaming Guidelines

Both individuals and organizations may upload and stream videos without permission.
If possible, we would appreciate it if you could include a link to the Steam page in the video description.
RAYBIS GAMES is not responsible for any damages caused by posting or streaming videos of the game.
These guidelines are subject to change without notice.
